title: School Clothing - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Foster Families > School Clothing 3 Matching Service Providers Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF ARK PROJECT OF COOS COUNTY ARK OF COOS COUNTY Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides basic needs, essential support services, crisis intervention, and advocacy. Services include a drop-in center, food pantry, children's clothing, school supplies, personal grooming supplies, feminine hygiene supplies, mentoring, information and referrals for other assistance agencies, and assistance in applying for identification. 817 S 10th Street Coos Bay, OR 97420 Eligibility: Ages 0-21 and their families who are experiencing homelessness Hours: School year: Monday-Thursday 1pm-5pm Summer: Tuesday-Wednesday 1pm-5pm (541) 267-3104 7115 Get Directions Visit Website More Details NORTH CLACKAMAS SCHOOL DISTRICT WICHITA CENTER FOR FAMILY AND COMMUNITY FAMILY SUPPORT CENTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a clothes closet, food pantry, school supplies, hygiene supplies, and support for North Clackamas School District students (NCSD) 6031 SE King Road Milwaukie, OR 97222 Eligibility: Food pantry: Families with children within the NCSD boundries All other services: Students enrolled in NCSD Hours: Tuesday/Thursday 10am-6pm, Wednesday 10am-4pm Email (503) 353-5663 Get Directions Visit Website More Details PORTLAND PUBLIC SCHOOLS BENSON POLYTECHNIC HIGH SCHOOL AT MARSHALL CAMPUS PTA CLOTHING CLOSET Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a clothing closet for families with school-aged children. Donations accepted. 3905 SE 91st Avenue Portland, OR 97266 Eligibility: Grades K-12 Hours: Monday/Thursday 10am-1pm beginning Thursday, September 4, 2025 through Thursday, April 30, 2026 Email (503) 916-5100 Get Directions Visit Website More Details ARK PROJECT OF COOS COUNTY ARK OF COOS COUNTY NORTH CLACKAMAS SCHOOL DISTRICT FAMILY SUPPORT CENTER PORTLAND PUBLIC SCHOOLS PTA CLOTHING CLOSET
